data.name: Mini Treasure Girl
data.detailed_description:
“Mini Treasure Girl” is our new game with a beautiful and naked girl in different poses. With awesome 3D animation! Much more frames and interactions!

In the game you need to resolve a few physics puzzles to get you reward.



What you can find in the game:
• Beautiful pictures and animations.
• Incredible sound.
• Funny puzzles to resolve.
• Gallery with hot pictures of our girl.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WINDOWS® 7 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3 Series or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
